summary.rootCause: Production still serves a generic Figma-hosted SPA shell for sampled HTML routes, while the current repo source contains static asset, redirect, protected route, checkout, and commerce contracts that pass local policy checks.
summary.releaseDecision: Do not classify release-ready or growth-ready from this baseline. Use this baseline to detect drift and verify remediation after production deploy parity is fixed.

commonHtmlShellObservation.title: Mitra Auto | Full-Service Garage in Helsinki - Tires, Maintenance & Repairs

representativeUrls.targetPolicy: Indexable homepage with route-specific raw metadata, self-canonical, crawlable links, and rendered parity.
Indexable English homepage with localized metadata/content and self-canonical.
Indexable Finnish service hub with crawlable links to approved canonical services.
Indexable Finnish DPF service page with route-specific title, canonical, Service/LocalBusiness graph, and visible booking path.
Indexable English DPF service page with localized metadata, canonical, visible service facts, and no internal review text.
Indexable Helsinki local page with visible local facts and LocalBusiness consistency.
Indexable contact page with visible NAP, hours, and actionable phone/email/maps links.
Indexable catalog hub when populated, with crawlable product/category paths and controlled facets.
Indexable canonical product slug with Product/Offer schema, price, availability, identifiers, feed/cart/checkout consistency.
Permanent one-hop redirect to the canonical product slug.
Permanent one-hop redirect to the canonical product slug.
Permanent one-hop redirect to /catalog.
Permanent one-hop redirect to /palvelut/dpf-huolto.
Noindex utility route, excluded from sitemap, no canonical, with checkout state guarded by current cart/order rules.
Noindex confirmation route, excluded from sitemap, no public order details without safe state.
Authenticated or safe 401/403/404, noindex, excluded from sitemaps, no public private/admin content.
Authenticated or safe 401/403/404, noindex, excluded from sitemaps, no public customer data.
Real 404 or 410 with safe noindex content.
Real 404 or 410 product-not-found state, noindex, no Product schema.
200 text/plain with no accidental global block and sitemap declarations.
200 application/xml or text/xml sitemap index containing canonical indexable URLs only.
200 XML product sitemap index, not HTML shell.
200 XML Merchant feed matching product pages, schema, cart, and checkout.

blockOn: Any public canonical route becomes blocked, noindex, non-200, or canonicalized to a wrong host.
robots.txt, sitemap.xml, product sitemaps, or Merchant feed are missing, HTML, redirected incorrectly, or wrong content type.
Legacy service/product routes or opaque product identifiers fail permanent one-hop redirect policy after deploy parity is fixed.
Private/admin/account routes render public 200 content or private data.
Unknown routes/products return public 200 soft-404 content.
Product page, schema, feed, cart, checkout, price, availability, or identifiers diverge.
Checkout, account, or order confirmation routes become indexable or enter sitemaps.
warnOn: Optional metadata, recommended schema fields, non-critical image metadata, or non-blocking accessibility markers regress.
New unused preload or client warning appears without observed task failure.
Crawl depth, response time, or link count changes without confirmed template policy failure.

limitations: This baseline does not include authenticated Cloudflare, Search Console, Google Business Profile, Merchant Center, analytics, server log, or field Core Web Vitals readback.
Rendered browser evidence is linked from E-3 and was not rerun in this E-4 baseline.
The baseline captures current production behavior as observed on 2026-06-23, not a readiness pass.
This artifact does not guarantee crawling, indexing, selected canonicals, rankings, rich results, local-pack visibility, Merchant Center approval, traffic, conversions, revenue, ROI, or AI inclusion.
